goal: finite A ⟹ card {x∈A. P x} + card {x∈A. ¬ P x} = card A
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ card {x∈A. P x} + card {x∈A. ¬ P x} = card A"

goal: finite A ⟹ card {x∈A. x∈B} = card (A ∩ B)
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ card {x∈A. x∈B} = card (A ∩ B)"

goal: finite A ⟹ card (insert x A) = (if x∈A then card A else Suc (card A))
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ card (insert x A) = (if x∈A then card A else Suc (card A))"

goal: inj_on f A ⟹ vimage f (f ` A) ∩ A = A
final_steps: lemma "inj_on f A ⟹ vimage f (f ` A) ∩ A = A"

goal: finite A ⟹ sum (λx. (if x∈A then (0::int) else 0)) A = 0
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ sum (λx. (if x∈A then (0::int) else 0)) A = 0"

goal: (∀x. f x = g x) ⟹ f = g
final_steps: lemma "(∀x. f x = g x) ⟹ f = g"

goal: surj f ⟹ f ∘ inv f = id
final_steps: lemma "surj f ⟹ f ∘ inv f = id"

goal: (∃!x. P x) ⟶ (∀x y. P x ∧ P y ⟶ x = y)
final_steps: lemma "(∃!x. P x) ⟶ (∀x y. P x ∧ P y ⟶ x = y)"

goal: finite A ⟹ card ({x} × A) = card A
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ card ({x} × A) = card A"

goal: ({x. P x} ∪ {x. Q x}) = {x. P x ∨ Q x}
final_steps: lemma "({x. P x} ∪ {x. Q x}) = {x. P x ∨ Q x}"

goal: (∀x. P x) ⟶ ((∀x. Q x ⟶ R x) ⟶ (∀x. P x ∧ Q x ⟶ R x))
final_steps: lemma "(∀x. P x) ⟶ ((∀x. Q x ⟶ R x) ⟶ (∀x. P x ∧ Q x ⟶ R x))"

goal: finite A ⟹ sum (λx. (if x∈B then (1::nat) else 0)) A = card (A ∩ B)
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ sum (λx. (if x∈B then (1::nat) else 0)) A = card (A ∩ B)"

goal: vimage f (A ∪ B) = vimage f A ∪ vimage f B
final_steps: lemma "vimage f (A ∪ B) = vimage f A ∪ vimage f B"

goal: inj_on f A ⟹ x∈A ⟹ inv_into A f (f x) = x
final_steps: lemma "inj_on f A ⟹ x∈A ⟹ inv_into A f (f x) = x"

goal: sum_list (map f (xs @ ys)) = sum_list (map f xs) + sum_list (map f ys)
final_steps: lemma "sum_list (map f (xs @ ys)) = sum_list (map f xs) + sum_list (map f ys)"

goal: finite A ⟹ card (A - {x}) = (if x∈A then card A - 1 else card A)
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ card (A - {x}) = (if x∈A then card A - 1 else card A)"

goal: finite A ⟹ finite B ⟹ card { (x,y)∈A×B. P x ∧ Q y } ≤ card A * card B
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ finite B ⟹ card { (x,y)∈A×B. P x ∧ Q y } ≤ card A * card B"

goal: (if A then (B ⟶ C) else True) ⟷ (¬ A ∨ (B ⟶ C))
final_steps: lemma "(if A then (B ⟶ C) else True) ⟷ (¬ A ∨ (B ⟶ C))"

goal: (∀x. f x = g x) ⟶ (∃!x. f x = a) ⟶ (∃!x. g x = a)
final_steps: lemma "(∀x. f x = g x) ⟶ (∃!x. f x = a) ⟶ (∃!x. g x = a)"

goal: (∀x∈A. f x = g x) ⟹ f ` A = g ` A
final_steps: lemma "(∀x∈A. f x = g x) ⟹ f ` A = g ` A"

goal: xs ≠ [] ⟹ nth (rev xs) i = nth xs (length xs - Suc i) ⟷ i < length xs
final_steps: lemma "xs ≠ [] ⟹ nth (rev xs) i = nth xs (length xs - Suc i) ⟷ i < length xs"

goal: finite A ⟹ sum (λx. c::int) A = c * int (card A)
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ sum (λx. c::int) A = c * int (card A)"

goal: finite A ⟹ (sum::nat) (λx. (f::nat) (x::nat) + (g::nat) x::int) A = sum f A + sum g A
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ (sum::nat) (λx. (f::nat) (x::nat) + (g::nat) x::int) A = sum f A + sum g A"

goal: (∀x. P x ⟶ Q x) ∧ (∃x. P x) ⟶ (∃x. Q x)
final_steps: lemma "(∀x. P x ⟶ Q x) ∧ (∃x. P x) ⟶ (∃x. Q x)"

goal: r ⊆ s ⟹ trancl r ⊆ trancl s
final_steps: lemma "r ⊆ s ⟹ trancl r ⊆ trancl s"

goal: foldr f b (xs @ ys) = foldr f (foldr f b ys) xs
final_steps: lemma "foldr f b (xs @ ys) = foldr f (foldr f b ys) xs"

goal: finite A ⟹ finite B ⟹ card ((A - C) × (B - D)) = (card A - card (A ∩ C)) * (card B - card (B ∩ D))
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ finite B ⟹ card ((A - C) × (B - D)) = (card A - card (A ∩ C)) * (card B - card (B ∩ D))"

goal: map f (drop n xs) = drop n (map f xs)
final_steps: lemma "map f (drop n xs) = drop n (map f xs)"

goal: zip (drop n xs) (drop n ys) = drop n (zip xs ys)
final_steps: lemma "zip (drop n xs) (drop n ys) = drop n (zip xs ys)"

goal: length (takeWhile P xs) + length (dropWhile P xs) = length xs
final_steps: lemma "length (takeWhile P xs) + length (dropWhile P xs) = length xs"

goal: finite A ⟹ card (SIGMA x∈A. F x) = sum (λx. card (F x)) A
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ card (SIGMA x∈A. F x) = sum (λx. card (F x)) A"

goal: finite A ⟹ card (A ∩ B) = card A - card (A - B)
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ card (A ∩ B) = card A - card (A - B)"

goal: foldl f a (xs @ ys) = foldl f (foldl f a xs) ys
final_steps: lemma "foldl f a (xs @ ys) = foldl f (foldl f a xs) ys"

goal: (if A then f x else f y) = f (if A then x else y)
final_steps: lemma "(if A then f x else f y) = f (if A then x else y)"

goal: nth (xs @ ys) i = nth xs i ⟷ i < length xs
final_steps: lemma "nth (xs @ ys) i = nth xs i ⟷ i < length xs"

goal: finite A ⟹ card {x∈A. P x ∧ Q x} + card {x∈A. P x ∧ ¬ Q x} = card {x∈A. P x}
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ card {x∈A. P x ∧ Q x} + card {x∈A. P x ∧ ¬ Q x} = card {x∈A. P x}"

goal: map snd (zip xs ys) = take (min (length xs) (length ys)) ys
final_steps: lemma "map snd (zip xs ys) = take (min (length xs) (length ys)) ys"

goal: finite A ⟹ inj_on f A ⟹ card (f ` A) = card A
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ inj_on f A ⟹ card (f ` A) = card A"

goal: finite A ⟹ sum (λx. (if P x then (1::nat) else 0)) A = card {x∈A. P x}
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ sum (λx. (if P x then (1::nat) else 0)) A = card {x∈A. P x}"

goal: finite A ⟹ card (A ∪ B) + card (A ∩ B) = card A + card B
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ card (A ∪ B) + card (A ∩ B) = card A + card B"

goal: finite A ⟹ inj_on f A ⟹ sum (λx. (1::nat)) (f ` A) = card A
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ inj_on f A ⟹ sum (λx. (1::nat)) (f ` A) = card A"

goal: finite A ⟹ finite B ⟹ (A ⊆ B) ⟷ (card A = card (A ∩ B))
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ finite B ⟹ (A ⊆ B) ⟷ (card A = card (A ∩ B))"

goal: (∃x. P x ∧ (Q x ⟶ R x)) ⟶ ((∃x. P x ∧ Q x) ⟶ (∃x. R x))
final_steps: lemma "(∃x. P x ∧ (Q x ⟶ R x)) ⟶ ((∃x. P x ∧ Q x) ⟶ (∃x. R x))"

goal: finite A ⟹ card ((A × B) ∩ (C × D)) = card (A ∩ C) * card (B ∩ D)
final_steps: lemma "finite A ⟹ card ((A × B) ∩ (C × D)) = card (A ∩ C) * card (B ∩ D)"

goal:
(⋀aa asa. map fa (filter pa asa) = filter pa (map fa asa) \<Longrightarrow>
              map fa (filter pa (aa # asa)) =
              filter pa (map fa (aa # asa)))
final_steps:
lemma "(⋀aa asa. map fa (filter pa asa) = filter pa (map fa asa) \<Longrightarrow>
              map fa (filter pa (aa # asa)) =
              filter pa (map fa (aa # asa)))"

(⋀aa asa. map fst (zip asa ysa) =
              take (min (length asa) (length ysa)) asa \<Longrightarrow>
              map fst (zip (aa # asa) ysa) =
              take (min (length (aa # asa)) (length ysa)) (aa # asa))
final_steps:

final_steps:

              zip (map fa (aa # asa)) (map ga ysa) =
              map (\<lambda>p. (fa (fst p), ga (snd p))) (zip (aa # asa) ysa))"

goal:
(⋀aa asa. (take na asa = take na (asa @ ysa)) =
              (na \<le> length asa) \<Longrightarrow>
              (take na (aa # asa) = take na ((aa # asa) @ ysa)) =
              (na \<le> length (aa # asa)))
final_steps:
lemma "(⋀aa asa. (take na asa = take na (asa @ ysa)) =
              (na \<le> length asa) \<Longrightarrow>
              (take na (aa # asa) = take na ((aa # asa) @ ysa)) =
              (na \<le> length (aa # asa)))"

goal:
(⋀aa asa. (asa @ ysa) ! na =
              (if na < length asa then asa ! na
               else ysa ! (na - length asa)) \<Longrightarrow>
              ((aa # asa) @ ysa) ! na =
              (if na < length (aa # asa) then (aa # asa) ! na
               else ysa ! (na - length (aa # asa))))
final_steps:
lemma "(⋀aa asa. (asa @ ysa) ! na =
              (if na < length asa then asa ! na
               else ysa ! (na - length asa)) \<Longrightarrow>
              ((aa # asa) @ ysa) ! na =
              (if na < length (aa # asa) then (aa # asa) ! na
               else ysa ! (na - length (aa # asa))))"

              map fa (take na (aa # asa)) =
              take na (map fa (aa # asa)))
final_steps:
lemma "(⋀aa asa. map fa (take na asa) = take na (map fa asa) \<Longrightarrow>
              map fa (take na (aa # asa)) =
              take na (map fa (aa # asa)))"

goal: rev (drop n xs) = take (length xs - n) (rev xs) ⟷ n ≤ length xs
final_steps: lemma "rev (drop n xs) = take (length xs - n) (rev xs) ⟷ n ≤ length xs"

goal: trancl (r ∪ s) = trancl (trancl r ∪ trancl s)
final_steps: lemma "trancl (r ∪ s) = trancl (trancl r ∪ trancl s)"
